headline: MSCI adds 19 A-shares; Pinglu Canal opens; Tiger Brokers halts mainland accounts
headline_zh: MSCI新增19只A股；平陆运河通水；老虎证券暂停内地客户开仓
narrative: Today' s data flow signals a dual-track strategy: Beijing is simultaneously deepening market access for foreign investors (MSCI inclusion) and tightening the screws on capital outflows (Tiger Brokers curbs). The Pinglu Canal's full navigation marks a landmark infrastructure milestone, reinforcing the regime's capacity for mega-project delivery and water network integration. Meanwhile, the corruption trial of former Inner Mongolia chair Wang Lixia underscores the Party's sustained anti-graft campaign even at senior levels. On the external front, China's tungsten hunt in the US and Nissan-Chery deal reflect the intensifying critical minerals race and auto sector globalization.
narrative_zh: 今日数据流显示双轨策略：北京一方面是深化外资准入（MSCI纳入），另一方面是收紧资本外流（老虎证券限制）。平陆运河全线通水标志着基础设施里程碑，巩固了政府交付大型项目和水网整合的能力。同时，内蒙古原主席王莉霞受审表明反腐持续进行。对外，中国在美钨矿搜寻和日产-奇瑞协议反映了关键矿产竞争和汽车业全球化加剧。

top_stories.english_title: Xi replies to young pioneers, urging them to follow the Party
top_stories.why_it_matters: The letter reinforces ideological transmission to youth ahead of the 105th Party anniversary next year.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 此信在建党105周年前夕强化了对青少年的意识形态传递。
top_stories.pull_quote: “高举队旗跟党走” emphasizes Party leadership over youth organizations.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: “高举队旗跟党走”强调党对青少年组织的领导。

top_stories.english_title: MSCI adds 19 A-shares to China Index
top_stories.why_it_matters: Inclusion signals continued international capital market opening and boosts passive fund inflows.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 纳入表明资本市场持续开放，将带来被动资金流入。
top_stories.pull_quote: 19 A-shares added to MSCI China Index, effective June 1.

top_stories.primary_title: 经纬度：平陆运河全线通水，大国水网再添标志性工程
top_stories.english_title: Pinglu Canal fully navigable, a milestone in national water network
top_stories.why_it_matters: The major infrastructure project boosts internal connectivity and showcases engineering prowess.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 重大基建项目提升内部连通性，展示工程能力。
top_stories.pull_quote: The canal connects the Xijiang River system to the Beibu Gulf, shortening shipping distance by 560 km.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 该运河连接西江水系与北部湾，缩短航程560公里。

top_stories.primary_title: “国家不让你胖” 也没让你瘦啊
top_stories.why_it_matters: The state-led health campaign taps into public concern and blends surveillance with wellness.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 政府主导的健康运动呼应公众关切，融合监控与健康管理。
top_stories.pull_quote: “国家不让你胖” became a trending meme, sparking discussions on government involvement in personal health.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: “国家不让你胖”成为热梗，引发对政府介入个人健康的讨论。

top_stories.primary_title: 中国“水上电梯”创造多个世界第一
top_stories.english_title: 'Water elevator' at Pinglu Canal sets world records
top_stories.why_it_matters: The engineering feat underscores China's capability in building massive hydraulic infrastructure.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 工程壮举凸显中国建设大型水利基础设施的能力。
top_stories.pull_quote: Madou ship lift has a 29.6m drop, the world's largest.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 马道枢纽水位差29.6米，世界最大。

top_stories.primary_title: 联合国安理会改选非常任理事国 菲律宾落选
top_stories.english_title: Philippines fails to win UN Security Council seat
top_stories.why_it_matters: The loss is a diplomatic setback for Manila and a win for China-backed candidates in the region.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 落选是马尼拉的外交挫折，有利于中国支持的区域候选国。
top_stories.pull_quote: Philippines lost to [other country] in the election for a non-permanent seat.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 菲律宾在非常任理事国选举中输给[另一国家]。

top_stories.primary_title: 2026年人工智能技术赋能网络安全应用测试公告
top_stories.english_title: AI-powered cybersecurity test announced by CAC
top_stories.why_it_matters: Signals regulatory push to integrate AI into state security apparatus.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 表明监管层推动人工智能融入国家安全体系。
top_stories.pull_quote: Test will evaluate AI applications in network security defense.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 测试将评估人工智能在网络安全防御中的应用。

top_stories.primary_title: 从市长到主席边升官边敛财 62岁正省级女高官王莉霞将受审
top_stories.english_title: Former Inner Mongolia chair Wang Lixia to stand trial for corruption
top_stories.why_it_matters: The case highlights continued high-level anti-corruption efforts; Wang is a rare female provincial chief facing trial.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 该案凸显持续的高层反腐；王是少有的受审女性省级正职。
top_stories.pull_quote: Wang is accused of taking bribes from 2002 to 2021 while holding various posts.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 王被指控在2002至2021年间利用职务便利受贿。

top_stories.primary_title: Analysis: China’s Local Fiscal Recovery Hides Scramble to Plug Budget Holes
top_stories.english_title: China's local fiscal recovery masks budget holes
top_stories.why_it_matters: Despite headline revenue growth, local governments rely on land sales and transfers to plug deficits.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 尽管收入增长，地方政府仍依赖土地出让和转移支付弥补赤字。
top_stories.pull_quote: Caixin analysis shows non-tax revenue surged 12% in Q1 as local governments scramble for funds.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 财新分析显示一季度非税收入激增12%，地方政府抢抓资金。

top_stories.primary_title: 老虎证券6月12日起将停止存量用户中国境内开仓加仓
top_stories.english_title: Tiger Brokers to stop mainland clients from opening new positions
top_stories.why_it_matters: The ban tightens capital outflow controls and pressures offshore brokerages.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 禁令收紧资本外流管控，给跨境券商施压。
top_stories.pull_quote: Effective June 12, existing mainland users cannot add positions in China.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 自6月12日起，存量内地用户不得在中国境内开仓加仓。

top_stories.primary_title: 前美团外卖技术负责人创业，做具身智能时代的“餐饮世界模型”
top_stories.english_title: Ex-Meituan food delivery tech lead founds AI startup
top_stories.why_it_matters: The move shows talent flow from big tech to embodied AI, targeting restaurant digitization.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 这表明人才从大厂流向具身智能领域，瞄准餐饮数字化。
top_stories.pull_quote: The startup aims to build a 'world model for food service' using AI.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 该公司旨在利用AI构建“餐饮世界模型”。

top_stories.primary_title: Nissan signs deal with China’s Chery for Sunderland car production
top_stories.english_title: Nissan partners with Chery for UK car production
top_stories.why_it_matters: Chinese automaker enters UK market via partnership, signaling global expansion despite tariffs.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 中国车企通过合作进入英国市场，显示在关税下的全球扩张。
top_stories.pull_quote: Deal involves Chery building Nissan models at Sunderland plant.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 协议涉及奇瑞在桑德兰工厂生产日产车型。

top_stories.primary_title: China’s hunt for US tungsten escalates global critical minerals race
top_stories.english_title: China's tungsten hunt in US escalates critical minerals race
top_stories.why_it_matters: China seeks to control sources of strategic mineral amid supply chain decoupling.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 在供应链脱钩背景下，中国寻求控制战略矿产来源。
top_stories.pull_quote: Chinese firms are acquiring US tungsten assets, raising national security concerns.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 中国企业收购美国钨矿资产，引发国家安全担忧。
